ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_units" (
  "unit_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production unit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production unit within the plant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum production capacity of the unit */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift schedule for the unit (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "unit_manager" TEXT /* Name of the unit manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the unit manager (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "unit_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the production unit where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of last calibration (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_unit_num FOREIGN KEY ("unit_num") REFERENCES production_units ("unit_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "unit_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the production unit where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work done */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_unit_num FOREIGN KEY ("unit_num") REFERENCES production_units ("unit_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the operator (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "kpi_list" TEXT /* List of KPIs tracked on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, manager) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "unit_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the production unit */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cycle */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_unit_num FOREIGN KEY ("unit_num") REFERENCES production_units ("unit_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "unit_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the production unit */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production cycle */,
  "predicted_metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the metric */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_unit_num FOREIGN KEY ("unit_num") REFERENCES production_units ("unit_num")
)
